text:
Intervenors / Joinder

[Name] is joined as [a party] / [an intervener] [limited for the purpose of [insert]].

[Name] must by 4.00pm on [date] provide [insert] with the case documents [necessary to deal with [insert]] [redacted as to [insert]].

Live with order

The child[ren] shall live with [name] [until further order] [as follows: [insert]].

Monitoring by [Cafcass] / [CAFCASS Cymru]

[Cafcass] / [CAFCASS Cymru] must monitor compliance with the [child arrangements order] / [activity direction] / [condition] made above until [date] and report to the court in the event of any significant non-compliance which the monitoring officer considers should be reported.

Next hearing(s)

The next hearing will be at [place] on [date] at [time] before [name of judge] allowing [number] hours which will be [an adjourned FHDRA] / [a dispute resolution appointment] / [a ground rules hearing] / [a fact-finding hearing] / [a final hearing] / [a review hearing]. The parties and advocates shall attend 1 hour prior to the listed time for pre-hearing discussions.

If any party fails to attend the any hearing without good reason, the court may make orders including final orders in their absence.

The parties must file with the court and serve on each other by no later than 11:00 am on the working day prior to the next hearing a position statement, including:

[a summary of the order or directions sought by that party at [that hearing] / [the final hearing]];

[his/her response to the section 7 report];

[confirming whether s/he is pursuing their allegations];

[a concise update as to the progress of contact];

[insert].

The case will be listed for a [directions hearing] / [ground rules hearing] / [PTR] at [time] on [date] allowing [time estimate].

An witness template shall be filed and served by not later than [insert] days prior to the final hearing.

[The author of the section 7 report] / [Witness name] [need not] / [must] attend the next hearing to give evidence.

Non-Court Dispute Resolution

(where miam attendance is required)
